recommendations.title: Facing the Giants
recommendations.overview: A losing coach with an underdog football team faces their giants of fear and failure on and off the field to surprising results.

recommendations.title: Overcomer
recommendations.overview: After reluctantly agreeing to coach cross-country, high school basketball Coach John Harrison helps the least likely runner attempt the impossible in the biggest race of the year.

recommendations.title: The Forge

recommendations.title: War Room

recommendations.title: Courageous
recommendations.overview: Law enforcement officers Adam Mitchell, Nathan Hayes, and their partners stand up to the worst the streets have to offer with confidence and focus. Yet at the end of the day, they face a challenge that none of them are truly prepared to tackle: fathe

recommendations.title: L'Atalante
recommendations.overview: Newly married couple Juliette and ship captain Jean struggle through marriage as they travel on the L'Atalante along with the captain's first mate and a cabin boy.

recommendations.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
recommendations.overview: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. Simran is the daughter of Chaudhary Baldev Singh, who in spite of being an NRI is very strict about adherence to Indian values. Simran has left for India to be married to her childhood fi

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.

recommendations.title: Tonight You're Sleeping with Me
recommendations.overview: Stuck in a passionless marriage, a journalist must choose between her distant but loving husband and a younger ex-boyfriend who has reentered her life
